title: MessagesRequest
description:
Messages request body (<https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/messages>).

`pub` so downstream crates (notably `bitrouter-cloud`) can derive an
OpenAPI schema from the canonical wire shape without redeclaring it.

output_config.description:
Structured-output + reasoning config â€” `format` (`json_schema`) is
promoted to the canonical `response_format` and `effort` to the canonical
reasoning effort. Sibling keys pass through via `extra`.
<https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/structured-outputs>

system.description: String or an array of `{type:"text", text}` blocks (#227 â†’ #228).

MessagesMessage.description: One element of [`MessagesRequest`]'s `messages` array â€” a `{ role, content }` turn.

content.description: String or an array of content blocks.

MessagesOutputConfig.description: Messages `output_config` â€” structured output + reasoning effort.

MessagesOutputFormat.description:
Messages `output_config.format`
(<https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/structured-outputs>).
Anthropic's GA structured-output format carries no name / strict.

MessagesTool.description: One element of [`MessagesRequest`]'s `tools` array â€” Anthropic's tool definition shape.
